name: pipeline-scene-to-unity
description: Create a Blender scene, export validated assets, import them into Unity, and run QA.

stages.instructions: Define scope, asset ids, budgets, and acceptance criteria.
Research only required OSS dependencies and record provenance and licenses.
Create named, correctly scaled geometry and update the manifest.
Create PBR materials, UVs, and texture references.
Compose layout, lighting, and camera framing.
Correct and validate terrain contact, hierarchy transforms, penetration or floating, rock burial, and terrain-relative camera clearance with evaluated world-space evidence.
Validate and export without overwriting unapproved files.
Import assets and assemble prefabs and the Unity scene.
Enter play mode, inspect console output, and report pass or fail.
Validate repository hygiene and prepare a meaningful commit.
